content: the mechanic where you can only keep 2 heroes of a comp
u are good with 1 comp now
u have to keep important unit
but i would rather keep sustain
the last few stages, they force u to use 2 full teams
they dont let u retain anything
like, i just always keep naut semmel and swap other units out all the time, every second fight is without sustain, but the fights are over to fast anyway
yep cuz naut and sem are broken
oh okay, already feared it would be like that
they will let u retain 2 -> retain 1 -> retain 0 (2 teams)
cuz artificial somnambulism is your main source drop farms
i figured after getting lucy, semmel and naut in just a few pulls, i go all the way to 200 pulls to get the guaranteed dupe
and pulled 3 additional nauts along the way
i really like naut, so why not?
also, would medpac be a good addition for the lucy ulrich comp?
should i not get dupes on naut?... i mean, im kinda deep anyway, but was that a bad decision?
Reminds me of some 90's jpop songs
i mean it is not bad if u pay for pulls
and u have foundations for 2 good teams
nautika is already top tier at p0
i have lucy ulrich, naut semmel fatutu, i have a selector where i could get medpac from, that would at least be 2 teams, and then i have willow, the rest is 5* or less
but yeah, i didnt have any problems rushing through content with autoplay
u have to manual cuz auto is dumb
u can get either melania or medpoc

u lack support -> melan
u lack sustain -> medpoc
choose base on your account's needs
i was thinking of going medpac because lucy ulrich
but i can pure a bit more i think
but i could also wait for what i pull and see after that
i think medpoc would value u more

next patch (3.0) we will have:
- Sentinel (Bloodtithe support)
- Charon (Dynamo support/sub dps)
oh man, naut just clears stages on her own now, because i can only retain 1 🤣

both of them are valuable 
-> Charon is better one to get, almost must get tier
and he is a dynamo support
very valuable for your Ulrich and Lucy
medpoc to be the sustain for 2nd team
so yeah if u are going to pull at least Charon
Naut p3 can carry a bit for your 1st team no worries
Naut p0 is alr the best dps in the game, now u have her p3
well, since one is a good support for my naut semmel team and the other for my lucy ulrich team, i guess i will pull for both anyway
they will show up with 20 pulls anyway, right? just like the others 😂
u are lucky and in a good spot
Rubushka and Corvus are just like filler for optimal settings/replacements
u dont have to go for them if u dont really need it
Corvus is replacement for those dont have Lucy OR want to be competitive for Raids
Rubushka is the healer of Bloodtithe but she doesnt have that much diff from Fatutu

since it took a while to get my first team to i3 (and thats with all those item chosing items and stuff like that that you get initially), i think i will just get medpoc and build my second team, should take a months or two
then i at least have 2 3 char teams
then with sentinel and charon, they will be made to 4 char teams
everything else i can decide after that
naut is literally single handedly doing the artificial somnambulism stages right now 🤣

you said one is more op than the other, who of those 2 should i pull first? charon, because lucy ulrich team is weaker than naut semmel, or sentinel because she makes the naut semmel completely broken?
also, any tips on lucy ulrich medpoc? which one should i focus on first to get that team usable asap? or all 3 equally?

Anjo Nala is an interesting dps
cuz her playstyle change based on the binded ally
her bis is another limited unit...
she can bind flutter and fua x3 per turn
i want to give u the detailed kit on Anjo
cuz she is an interesting one
but im not on my pc
THIS is what im talking about, where do i get mommy anjo?
u have to wait for her rerun

Anjo Nala works like this -> Battle start -> u can choose bind 1 ally, based on different afflatus binded, she gains diff stats + following effects:
- Spirit/Intel: will attack scale off number of debuffs
- Beast/Plant: increase moxie's gain but for trade of hp
- Star/Mineral: cast aoe fua attack all enemies with limit per turn
she is a very interesting dps
sadly she couldnt catch up all the number inflations
she can comeback with her eupho
